docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SIPOS, GARY MCVEY, SARA AS TO DEFENDANT VERMA, VINIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED AUG-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VERMA, VINIT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH M. FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF GARY SIPOS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SARA MCVEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VINIT VERMA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS/WIFE VIDHI VERMA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIPOS, GARY MCVEY, SARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERMA, VINIT $1,212.98 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,337.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
